channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: These companies help parents try to pick their babies' traits. Experts are wary
item.description: Prospective parents can now pick embryos based on risk predictions for thousands of diseases and odds for specific traits. But should they?
item.content:encoded:
Prospective parents can now pick embryos based on risk predictions for thousands of diseases and odds for specific traits. But should they?

(Image credit: Kate Medley for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein

item.title: Republicans want to add $1 billion for Trump's ballroom security to ICE funding plan
item.description: Republicans in Congress are proposing $1 billion in funding for security for President Trump's White House ballroom as part of their partisan plan to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement.
item.content:encoded:
Republicans in Congress are proposing $1 billion in funding for security for President Trump's White House ballroom as part of their partisan plan to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: Preserving pollinators is good for health -- and income
item.description: Pollinators have economic and health benefits, but those benefits have been difficult to quantify. A new study puts some numbers to how important pollinators are for both nutrition and income.
item.content:encoded: Pollinators have economic and health benefits, but those benefits have been difficult to quantify. A new study puts some numbers to how important pollinators are for both nutrition and income.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Lambert

item.title: How Silicon Valley's new tech right has profited by aligning with MAGA
item.description: Atlantic writer George Packer discusses how tech venture capitalists, who are heavily invested in AI and cryptocurrency, aligned with Trump and influenced policies related to their own investments.
item.content:encoded: Atlantic writer George Packer discusses how tech venture capitalists, who are heavily invested in AI and cryptocurrency, aligned with Trump and influenced policies related to their own investments.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: Greetings from a sea village in Indonesia, where Indigenous fishing gets help from mangroves
item.description: As a water taxi rounded a corner at sunset, the village of Torosiaje came into view, with its colorful stilted houses perched over the Molucca Sea.
item.content:encoded: As a water taxi rounded a corner at sunset, the village of Torosiaje came into view, with its colorful stilted houses perched over the Molucca Sea.
item.dc:creator: Katerina Barton

item.title: 'A trailblazer, a rabble-rouser, a do-gooder': CNN founder Ted Turner dies at 87
item.description: Turner had a larger-than-life personality, and used it to launch the country's first 24/7 all-news network.
item.content:encoded:
Turner had a larger-than-life personality, and used it to launch the country's first 24/7 all-news network.

(Image credit: Rick Diamond/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik

item.title: Have you lost or are worried about losing SNAP benefits? NPR wants to hear your story
item.description: NPR wants to hear from people impacted by changes to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program.
item.content:encoded:
NPR wants to hear from people impacted by changes to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Iran is reviewing a U.S. proposal as Trump threatens renewed bombing if it doesn't agree
item.description: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman said negotiators are assessing the Trump administration's latest proposal and will relate a response to mediating country Pakistan.
item.content:encoded:
Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman said negotiators are assessing the Trump administration's latest proposal and will relate a response to mediating country Pakistan.

(Image credit: Amirhosein Khorgooi)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Democrats gain midterm edge, NPR poll shows. And, U.S. pauses 'Project Freedom'
item.description: Democrats outpace Republicans in voter enthusiasm for the midterm elections, according to NPR's latest poll. And Trump says "Project Freedom" is paused because of progress toward an Iran agreement.
item.content:encoded:
Democrats outpace Republicans in voter enthusiasm for the midterm elections, according to NPR's latest poll. And Trump says "Project Freedom" is paused because of progress toward an Iran agreement.

(Image credit: Justin Sullivan)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: A new Medicare option for weight loss drugs is coming: Here's what to know
item.description: Millions of people with Medicare will soon be eligible to get discounted GLP-1 drugs for weight loss. Here's how it will work.
item.content:encoded:
Millions of people with Medicare will soon be eligible to get discounted GLP-1 drugs for weight loss. Here's how it will work.

(Image credit: Universal Images Group)
item.dc:creator: Jackie Fortiér
